race.description: Pcm Catering & Coolroom Hire Midway Hcp
race.comment: SMILING PROPHET (6) good fresh mare with a handy record over this track and trip. Finished second in a recent trial here and will benefit from Fitzgerald's 1.5kg claim. Can sit off the fast tempo and launch late. Value contender. LIKE A SURGEON (8) resumes. Unwanted in betting on debut when she came from last on the turn for a sharp victory over 900m at Newcastle five months ago. Fitted with a recent trial win over 845m at this track. Sure to be thereabouts. BODE AKUNA (2) anchored with the 62kg second-up when back in class for a dominant come-from-behind win over 1000m at Canberra. Confidence is high and can keep the winning momentum going. WELCOME GYPSY (4) comes back a few levels today and is due for a change of luck. Tempo suits and no shock to see her in the placings.
